subject: [PATCH v2 5/7] mm: list_lru: introduce caller locking for additions and deletions

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the locking primitives and their interaction with existing code. Suggested a more detailed explanation of the locking mechanism and its implications for concurrent access.

2026-03-12.patch_summary: This patch introduces caller locking for additions and deletions in the list_lru API, allowing callers to keep auxiliary state synchronized with LRU state. The THP shrinker is an example use case that requires this functionality.
